g.text: Why does Positional Encoding need register_buffer()?

text.tspan: Using `nn.Parameter` for PE causes the optimizer to **gradually destroy** the carefully designed sinusoidal encodings. After several training epochs, positional information becomes **random noise**.
**Always use `register_buffer` for fixed tensors that should be saved but not trained!**

g.text: # But only params get optimizer updates!

text.tspan: # But only params get optimizer updates!

g.text: ⚠️ Buffers are saved for inference/checkpointing but never trained

text.tspan: | Use case | Learnable weights | Fixed constants |
